fields.field: {cimerant:type=field, default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, fieldType=DATETIME, nullable=false}

{cimerant:type=field, default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE NOW(), fieldType=DATETIME, nullable=false}
